experience.title: Senior Information Technology Manager
experience.description: Program Manager that drove and finalized a major project initiative consisting of migrating 13,000 Exchange On-Premise mail users/accounts to cloud based services (Office 365). Program Manager responsible for implementation and management of systems that allow Asset/Lease Reporting, Enterprise Backup, Patch Management and Application Distribution to over 10,000 PC's globally utilizing cloud based solutions.

experience.title: Senior Information Systems Professional
experience.description: Developed long and short-term technology Server and Storage plans, formulated policies and procedures, and provided technology presentations to diverse groups of internal customers.

experience.title: Network Support Engineer
experience.description: Provided support for NT, Netware, Macintosh, Cisco, 3Com, and Bay networks.

experience.title: Senior Technician
experience.description: End of the line hardware and software support. Responsible for troubleshooting, identifying, and resolving end user hardware and application issues.

extra_fields.certifications: Microsoft Certified Professional/Administrator, CompTIA A+, Network+, Security +, Novell Netware Engineer, Citrix Administrator, Red hat Administrator, CMA (Certified Management Accountant)
extra_fields.affiliations: VMware Users group, EMC Users group, Association of Information Technology Professionals, Leadership Development Program
